metadata.description: Marketplace privado do Pedro: 17 plugins (skills, hooks e automações) pessoais para Claude Code.

plugins.name: bootstrap
plugins.description: Bootstrap a new machine to Pedro's Claude Code setup — auto-syncs marketplaces and plugins via hooks AND applies the versioned global config (env, permissions, flags, global CLAUDE.md, machine-resolved statusLine). Run /bootstrap:setup once per machine. Replaces bootstrap-third-party.

plugins.name: fallow
plugins.description: Runs Fallow (static JS/TS analyzer — dead code, duplication, complexity), classifies findings by type and confidence, and delivers an interactive report where Pedro picks what to clean. Audits the Fallow report (convergence goal + liveness propagation) to catch false-positives the static analysis misses — cron/systemd, HTTP routes, dynamic imports — framed as tool limitations, not code bugs. Cleanup with a safety net (preview + build/test).

plugins.name: slides
plugins.description: Markdown outline → keynote-grade single-file HTML deck. Theme system (VIU default), big-typography presentation language, strict text fidelity (never invents text), output next to the source .md.

plugins.name: visual
plugins.description: CLI walls-of-text → interactive HTML dark-theme views. Plans, diagnostics, and decisions rendered in the browser with live sync back to Claude via local daemon.

plugins.name: context-guard
plugins.description: Auto-interrupts workflow when context window exceeds configurable threshold (default 80%). Bridges statusLine and PostToolUse hooks via temp file. Forwards to any existing statusLine (claude-hud or other) via CLAUDE_STATUSLINE_FORWARD env var.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Session continuity in a single command — /handoff detects the session state and routes: full context → saves a complete knowledge-transfer document; freshly cleared session → resumes from it. Workspace-aware: the handoff belongs to the project the session touched (resolves the .git boundary of the edited files), so it works for a standalone project, a monorepo (one HANDOFF-<module>.md per module), or an umbrella folder with nested projects — no more clobbering between parallel sessions on the same root. Optional [salvar|retomar] argument forces the mode.

plugins.name: raiox
plugins.description: RAIOX — replicable YouTube channel intelligence for VIU Studio. Orchestrates the viu-raiox pipeline (public fetch → DuckDB fact store → 7 code-only analysis modules → orphan-number validation) per channel YAML config. Honesty Rule: every citable number is born in code-generated JSON; LLM never originates numbers. v0 rail; LLM curation and output templates are Phase C.

plugins.name: sovai
plugins.description: Autonomous execution mode — executes any plan to completion without user interruptions, checkpoints, or confirmations. Skips blocked items (no silent workarounds), logs all decisions, runs a final headless qa-loop pass, and delivers the final report as an interactive /visual HTML review surface (markdown fallback).

plugins.name: project-doc
plugins.description: Generate a structured documentation system from ALL project evidence — files, handoffs, memory, graph, git log, and session transcripts — kept in a versioned append-only journal and projected into a CLAUDE.md index + .claude/docs/*.md + thin pointers. A scrubber moves secrets to a vault, never to git. Delta/--deep/--rebuild, monorepo layouts, a doc-first guard hook, post-generation verification, and stale-artifact cleanup.

plugins.name: qa-loop
plugins.description: Disciplined review-and-fix loop that stops on diminishing returns (quality vs worth-it), not on zero. Anchored to the implementation plan, with a per-fix regression gate, severity stop criterion, accepted-limits, churn detector, an interactive human report (via /visual: 4 actionable categories + live selection) and an agentic journal. Replaces qa, rev6 and iterate.

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Relentless one-question-at-a-time design review. Stress-tests plans and decisions by walking every branch of the decision tree.

plugins.name: grill-with-docs
plugins.description: Relentless design review that challenges plans against the project's domain model, sharpens terminology, and updates CONTEXT.md and ADRs inline as decisions crystallise.

plugins.name: principles
plugins.description: Contextual system design principles for planning and review. Reads PRINCIPIOS-SISTEMAS.md, maps relevant categories to the current context, generates a practical guide with WHY + HOW.

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Production deploy flow: lint, type-check, commit, push, deploy in one disciplined sequence.

plugins.name: improve
plugins.description: Generic self-improvement implementer using the autoresearch ML methodology. Reads the app's IMPROVEMENT_PROGRAM.md, fetches proposals from GitHub Issues (label 'autoresearch'), implements changes.

plugins.name: graphify-guard
plugins.description: Ensures graphify knowledge graphs get consulted when relevant. SessionStart heads-up when a project has a graph; PreToolUse net redirects blind grep/glob/find to `graphify query` once per session. Detects stale graphs and offers `graphify --update`. Defense in depth, fail-open, monorepo-aware.

plugins.name: guardrails
plugins.description: Global editing guardrails as hooks: post-edit lint & type-check (JS/TS/Python), an LLM scope-cop that blocks UI edits drifting from the approved plan, and an Agent Teams misuse guard. Portable across machines — replaces hand-rolled hooks in ~/.claude/settings.json. Run /guardrails:setup once per machine to set the env var and clear the old hooks.
